topic: percent of change, multi-step percent problems
latex:
Yesterday, 270 concert tickets were sold. Today, 216 tickets were sold.

\textbf{a.} Find the percent of change in the number of tickets sold from yesterday to today.

\textbf{b.} Predict tomorrow's ticket sales when this pattern continues using the percent of change you found in part (a).

\textbf{c.} Predict the percent of change in the number of tickets sold from yesterday to tomorrow using your answer to part (b).
